Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 17 

CONTRACT_ID_13 (reference year) 

LABEL: Part D Contract Identifier for Reference Year 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique number CMS assigns to each contract that a Part D plan has with CMS. This 
was the Contract ID for the plan in 2013 (the reference year). It may or may not be the same as the 
Contract ID in the previous year (2012). 

This field is a key that links of
